The '''T1-B hovertank''' was a tank used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the early stages of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Description==
The T1-B [[Hovertank/Legends|hovertank]], known colloquially as a "Rebel hover tank", was manufactured by [[Yutrane-Trackata/Legends|Yutrane-Trackata]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] to use in their fight against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Intended for use against ground infantry and aircraft, the [[Tank/Legends|tank]] was armed with [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and [[Flak/Legends|flak]] pods. The T1-B was lightly armored and came equipped with a [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]]. Though the shields did not last long under sustained fire, they did protect the tank from damage sustained from lightly armed vehicles.<ref name="ForceCommander">''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''</ref> Later improvements to the T1-B formed the [[T3-B heavy attack tank]], known as a 'heavy hover tank'.<ref name="SWGB">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''</ref>

==History==
T1-B tanks were used by the [[Alliance Army/Legends|Alliance Army]] during several missions in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], including the [[Battle of Kalaan]], the [[Evacuation of Yavin]], the [[Reytha campaign]], the [[Battle of Geddes]], the [[Zaloriis campaign/Legends|Battle of Zaloriis]] and the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' {{1st}}
